title: Model Metadata
description: Metadata about a deployed model in an OIP-compliant inference server. Describes the model's name, available versions, serving platform, and input/output tensor specifications.

name.description: Name of the model as registered in the inference server.

versions.description: List of available model versions. May be empty if versioning is not supported.

inputs.description: Input tensor specifications for the model.

outputs.description: Output tensor specifications for the model.

TensorMetadata.title: Tensor Metadata
TensorMetadata.description: Specification of a single input or output tensor.

datatype.description: Data type (BOOL, INT32, FP32, BYTES, etc.)

shape.description: Tensor shape. -1 indicates a dynamic dimension.
